issues.description: Condition checks 'HasRestingDon' but effect requires resting 5 DON!! cards as a cost, not a condition. Should use 'cost' field with RestDon action, not a condition.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is incorrect. Card text says 'up to 1', which should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOptional' or similar optional targeting.
Second condition 'If you have any DON!! cards given' is missing entirely. DSL only checks for resting DON but does not verify leader has attached DON cards.
TrashFromHand is a cost, not an action. Should be in 'cost' field, and conditional PowerBoost should follow only if cost is paid.
Target scope should be 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeaderOptional' to reflect 'up to 1' in the text.
